title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Chopper as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What's going on over there, chopper?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Little girl! Do you really to intend to fight with a whole fleet of soldiers and stop us all by your- self?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the meantime, we'll send your ship to the depths! cease this useless strugglinggin-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap! Where the hell is this ship going to drift off to now?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 7 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
